hero.title: Nakshtara Gems & Fine Jewellery
hero.subtitle: Experience the ultimate in diamond craftsmanship and custom fine jewellery.
hero.description: Welcome to Nakshtara Gems. Explore our curated selections of GIA certified diamonds, engagement bands, and bespoke jewelry creations crafted by premier artisans.

about.title: Our Story & Heritage
about.description: Crafting premium certified diamonds and fine bespoke jewelry since 1998, Nakshtara is built on the pillars of impeccable quality, transparency, and high-fashion artisanal heritage.
about.origins: Established originally as a boutique loose diamond wholesaler, Nakshtara quickly gained a reputation among elite global distributors for curating only the top 1% of GIA-graded gemstones. By 2005, the Maison transitioned to offering bespoke retail designs, combining traditional Indian metalworking craftsmanship with sleek contemporary minimalist layouts.
about.quote: A diamond does not shine by itself; it is the craftsman's devotion that wakes the fire hidden inside.
